REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SEAN KOMARMY AND VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. REQUESTS FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE ARE GRANTED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION SO THAT IT IS DISTINCT FROM THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION, I.E. ADDS SOMETHING TO THE COMPLAINT BY WAY OF FACT OR THEORY OF RECOVERY. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE NON-SPECULATIVE DAMAGES. IF PLAINTIFF CANNOT SO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH IN LIGHT OF THE CURRENT STAGE OF CONSTRUCTION - ATTACHMENT A REQUIREMENTS TO RESOLUTION 42-2016; LIST OF EXISTING PERMITS (SEE EX A TO DEFENDANT'S RJN) - THE ACTION IS NOT RIPE FOR ADJUDICATION. SEE PEOPLE EX REL. DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS V. AYON (1960) 54 CAL.2D 217. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES AN ACTIONABLE MISREPRESENTATION AND JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLENE P. KIESSELBACH, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew S. Cantor (415-817-1708) Plaintiff/opposing party in pro per.
Melissa M. Palozola (415-400-0828) for Defendant/Moving party Sean Komarmy and Vanguard Properties.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: negligence and negligent misrepresentation, speculative and non speculative damages. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Requests for Judicial Notice are GRANTED. Demurrer is sustained as to negligence cause of action for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of this cause of action so that it is distinct from the cause of action for negligent misrepresentation, i.e. adds something to the complaint by way of fact or theory of recovery. Demurrer is sustained as to the cause of action for Negligent Misrepresentation for Plaintiff to allege non-speculative damages. If Plaintiff cannot so allege in good faith in light of the current stage of construction - Attachment A requirements to Resolution 42-2016; list of existing permits (See Ex A to Defendant's RJN) - the action is not ripe for adjudication. See People ex rel. Department of Public Works v. Ayon (1960) 54 Cal.2d 217. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges an actionable misrepresentation and justifiable reliance. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew S. Cantor (415-817-1708) Plaintiff/opposing party in pro per.
Melissa M. Palozola (415-400-0828) for Defendant/Moving party Sean Komarmy and Vanguard Properties.

The Court announce the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with the Demurrer. Hearing is held. Argued re: negligence and negligent misrepresentation, speculative and non speculative damages. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order. Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
